title: Vascon Engineers is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Vascon Engineers is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Vascon Engineers, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Vascon Engineers:
Vascon Engineers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vascon Engineers!
